name: kotlin-plan-demo
_note: Minimal single-agent protocol demonstrating the plan-as-Kotlin prompt (prompts/kotlin-plan.md). The `plan` agent must emit its plan as a Kotlin .kts string in evidence.plan_kts; the deterministic kotlin-plan-present check verifies the FORM of that plan (analyzable-looking, literal sink destinations) before it would be handed to a taint verifier. Started by a `/kotlin-plan` comment on a PR (routed by lib.route via the orchestrator); driven offline from tests/test_kotlin_plan.py.
